title: Hypertension follow-up

items.final_wording: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth hypertension scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth hypertension scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

items.rationale: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and emergency exclusions.

items.final_wording: Specifies office, repeated home, and ambulatory blood-pressure assessment and hypertension staging.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies office, repeated home, and ambulatory blood-pressure assessment and hypertension staging.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped blood-pressure terminology, repeated or home readings, and staged measurement context.

items.final_wording: Describes monitoring phases, clinician-judged laboratory review, lifestyle domains, and monthly review context.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.evidence_paraphrase: Describes monitoring phases, clinician-judged laboratory review, lifestyle domains, and monthly review context.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped adherence and lifestyle review domains without creating treatment recommendations.

items.final_wording: Lists severe blood pressure, confusion, visual changes, chest pain, breathlessness, neurological symptoms, severe headache, and specialist referral criteria.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists severe blood pressure, confusion, visual changes, chest pain, breathlessness, neurological symptoms, severe headache, and specialist referral criteria.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped severe-pressure, chest-pain, breathlessness, visual, neurological, and headache concern prompts.

items.final_wording: Lists follow-up electrolytes, renal function, lipids, urine ACR, glucose or HbA1c, liver tests, blood count, and ECG according to medication and result context.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists follow-up electrolytes, renal function, lipids, urine ACR, glucose or HbA1c, liver tests, blood count, and ECG according to medication and result context.

items.rationale: Directly supports mapped renal, electrolyte, lipid, urine ACR, ECG, and follow-up laboratory documentation.
